mechanics: DOCUMENTED: ASGARD is a Norse-pantheon boss gauntlet — Heimdall, Loki, Hela, Odin, Thor each appear with their own taunts. Heimdall summons 'guardians' and has an attack-immune phase; Hela summons 'vermins' and is 'Powered by thousands of souls'; Loki is trickery-themed; Thor is thunder-themed. The server's global boss-event ANNOUNCER is named 'Harpy' (not 'Oryx'): 'Harpy> The Cube God has been defeated', 'Harpy> Pulse has just spawned!', 'Harpy> The Pulse has been defeated', 'Harpy> The [?] Yeti has been defeated' — confirming Galactic-Zone bosses Cube God, Pulse, and Yeti as spawn/announce events.
uncertain: Several taunt lines cut off at the chat-box right edge (35% crop) — endings reconstructed in brackets. Drop list from a partially-legible NPC dialog. Phase order/HP thresholds not captured.
confidence: HIGH for taunts (5 Norse bosses, VERBATIM where not edge-clipped) and the 'Harpy' announcer + Galactic bosses (Cube God/Pulse/Yeti); MEDIUM for map; LOW for exact drops.
